tools.name: search_bulgarian_news
tools.description: Семантично търсене в агрегирани български новини от водещите издания (dnes.bg, news.bg, dariknews.bg, trud.bg, blitz.bg). Use for any question about current events, people, places, or topics in Bulgaria. Returns the most relevant summarized stories with their source outlets and canonical links. Quer

tools.name: get_leading_news
tools.description: Връща водещите новини за деня в България — an importance-ranked leaderboard of stories clustered across outlets. Use when asked what the top, leading, or breaking news in Bulgaria is right now. Each entry includes a short reason it is leading and how many outlets cover it.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Връща пълното резюме на конкретна новина по нейния числов идентификатор (id), заедно с всички източници. Use after search_bulgarian_news or get_leading_news to expand one story by the id shown in its link.

tools.name: list_recent_news
tools.description: Връща най-новите новини в хронологичен ред (newest first), with cursor pagination. Use to browse the latest headlines rather than search a specific topic.
